---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: '[Feature]: '
labels: ['enhancement']
assignees: ''
---

## Problem statement

Describe the problem or pain point this request addresses.

## Proposed solution

Describe the change you want to see.

## Alternatives considered

List any alternatives or workarounds you considered.

## Impact

Who benefits from this feature and how?

## Additional context

Add links, mockups, references, or examples.

## Checklist

- [ ] I searched existing issues and discussions first.
- [ ] This request is scoped to a concrete problem.
- [ ] I included enough context for maintainers to evaluate.
